---
title: "Bucephalus"
output: html_document
---

# Perform basic analyses, output figures and tables for Buceph data

``` {r BasicStats}

### Stats for Buceph Prevalence
# Buceph prevalence by section
BucephStats <- Buceph %>%
  mutate(BucephInfected = ifelse(Parasite == "Buceph", 1, 0),
         AnalysisDate = as.Date(floor_date(TripDate, unit = "month")),
         Plot_Date = as.Date(AnalysisDate + 14)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(BucephInfected)) %>% # Remove null records
  group_by(AnalysisDate, Plot_Date, Estuary, SectionName) %>% 
  summarise(n_BucephTotal = n(),
    n_BucephInfected = sum(BucephInfected, na.rm = TRUE),
    BucephInfected_mean = (n_BucephInfected / n_BucephTotal) * 100,
    BucephInfected_ci = list(binom.test(n_BucephInfected, n_BucephTotal)$conf.int),
    .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    BucephInfected_ci_lower = map_dbl(BucephInfected_ci, 1) * 100,
    BucephInfected_ci_upper = map_dbl(BucephInfected_ci, 2) * 100,
  )
  

# Median values
BucephStatsMedian <- BucephStats %>%
  filter(AnalysisDate < ReportStart) %>%
  group_by(SectionName) %>%
  summarise(BucephPMedian = median(BucephInfected_mean, na.rm = TRUE),
            BucephPMax = max(BucephInfected_mean, na.rm = TRUE))

```

``` {r Buceph Prevalence Figures}

### Function explanation
# generate_plot(df, 
#               x_variable, x_label, 
#               y_variable, y_label, y_SD, 
#               UseColor, UseFill, 
#               title)

# Stats for Buceph Prevalence by Year and Section
BucephPrevalenceStats_Section_fig <- generate_grouped_plot(BucephStats, 
                                                "Plot_Date", "Date", 
                                                "BucephInfected_mean", "Buceph Prevalence (%)", "BucephInfected_ci_upper", 
                                                "SectionName", "SectionName", 
                                                "AB Oyster Buceph Prevalence by Year and Section")
print(BucephPrevalenceStats_Section_fig)

```

``` {Buceph Text}
### Placeholder for Buceph text for report
```
This is text to output for Buceph
